name: Muslin Swaddle Blanket - Cloud Island™ Trucks
description:
Make sure baby stays snug and comfortable wrapped in this Muslin Blanket from cloud island™. Made from 100% muslin cotton fabric, this printed baby swaddle blanket feels soft against their skin and helps them stay warm, making it great as a stroller cover, a burp cloth or a nursing blanket. Adorned with an allover print of colorful vehicles on a white background, this muslin swaddle blanket is sure to add coziness, comfort, and a bit of fun flair to your little one's nursery decor.

cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
